basic_details.job_title: PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTAU) Graduate Teaching Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 17 July 2026 on the official website pjtau.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026.

salary_details.details: Rs. 32,000/- per month on consolidated pay

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Overview
PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PJTAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 32,000/- per month on consolidated pay

content_sections.heading: PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: PJTAU Graduate Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the PJTAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Graduate Teaching Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Graduate Teaching Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Sc (Ag.) in any discipline to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 32,000 per month on a consolidated pay basis.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview venue is in Siddipet, Telangana, with pincode 502114.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of PJTAU?
faq.answer: The official website of Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University is pjtau.edu.in.
